zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrix von Krautheim於1220年出生在德國巴登-爾特波格內卡爾-登瓦爾-可萊斯莫斯巴賀時，她的父親Wolrad II. von Krautheim36歲，母親Grumbach32歲。她於大約1220年與Otto I, Graf von Eberstein結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1262年7月22日享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrix von Krautheim于1220年出生在德国巴登-爾特波格內卡爾-登瓦爾-可萊斯莫斯巴賀时，她的父亲Wolrad II. von Krautheim36岁，母亲Grumbach32岁。她于大约1220年与Otto I, Graf von Eberstein结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1262年7月22日享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Krautheim
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from any of various places called Krautheim, for example in Baden-Württemberg, Bavaria, and Thuringia.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrix von Krautheim was born in 1220, in Mosbach, Neckar-Odenwald-Kreis, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, her father, Wolrad II. von Krautheim, was 36 and her mother, Grumbach, was 32. She married Otto I, Graf von Eberstein about 1220. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 22 July 1262, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrix von Krautheim est née en 1220, à Mosbach, Neckar-Odenwald-Kreis, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Wolrad II. von Krautheim, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Grumbach, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Otto I, Graf von Eberstein environ 1220. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 juillet 1262, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrix von Krautheim 1220 in Mosbach, Neckar-Odenwald-Kreis, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Wolrad II. von Krautheim 36 und ihre Mutter Grumbach 32. Sie hat um 1220 Otto I, Graf von Eberstein geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. Juli 1262 im Alter von 42 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix von Krautheim è nata il nel 1220 nel Mosbach, Neckar-Odenwald-Kreis, Baden-Württemberg, Germania, sua padre, Wolrad II. von Krautheim, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Grumbach, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Otto I, Graf von Eberstein circa 1220. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 22 luglio 1262, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrix von Krautheimが1220年にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグネッカー-オデンワルド-クレイスモスバチで生まれた時，父Wolrad II. von Krautheimは36歳，母Grumbachは32歳であった。約1220年にOtto I, Graf von Ebersteinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1262年7月22日に42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix von Krautheim(이)가 1220년 독일 바데-wu르테버그 니c카-데월드-크레이스 모스바치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Wolrad II. von Krautheim(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Grumbach(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1220년 Otto I, Graf von Eberstein(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1262년 7월 22일 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix von Krautheim nasceu em 1220, em Mosbach, Neckar-Odenwald-Kreis, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Wolrad II. von Krautheim, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Grumbach, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Otto I, Graf von Eberstein aproximadamente 1220. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de julho de 1262, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrix von Krautheim родилась в 1220 г. в местности мосбач, неккар-оденвалд-крис, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия, её отцу по имени Wolrad II. von Krautheim было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Grumbach, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Otto I, Graf von Eberstein около 1220 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 22 июля 1262 г. в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrix von Krautheim nació en 1220, en Mosbach, Neckar-Odenwald-Kreis, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania, su papá, Wolrad II. von Krautheim, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Grumbach, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Otto I, Graf von Eberstein aproximadamente 1220. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 22 de julio de 1262, a la edad de 42 años.
